'''namate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ominously|ominously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ominously|ominously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| namate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:namate|namate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:namatesher|namatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namatesherĂ«m|namatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:namatero|namatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:namateshĂ«|namateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namateshĂ«m|namateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinamatero|gokinamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinamateshĂ«|gokinamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamateshĂ«m|gokinamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonamankerom|gonamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonamankeshĂ«|gonamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamankeshĂ«m|gonamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonamankeya|gonamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:namaterom|namaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namatemu|namatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:namateya|namateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinamaterom|gokinamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamatemu|gokinamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinamateya|gokinamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:namamate|namamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:namamatesher|namamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namamatesherĂ«m|namamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:namamatero|namamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:namamateshĂ«|namamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namamateshĂ«m|namamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinamamatero|gokinamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinamamateshĂ«|gokinamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamamateshĂ«m|gokinamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonamamankerom|gonamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonamamankeshĂ«|gonamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonamamankeshĂ«m|gonamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonamamankeya|gonamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:namamaterom|namamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:namamatemu|namamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:namamateya|namamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinamamaterom|gokinamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinamamatemu|gokinamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinamamateya|gokinamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠte|nĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠtesher|nĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠtero|nĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠtero|gokinĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠterom|nĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠtemu|nĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠmĂŠteya|nĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠterom|gokinĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠmĂŠteya|gokinĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafmafte|nafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafmaftesher|nafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafmaftesherĂ«m|nafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafmaftero|nafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafmafteshĂ«|nafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafmafteshĂ«m|nafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafmaftero|gokinafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafmafteshĂ«|gokinafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafmafteshĂ«m|gokinafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafmafnkerom|gonafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafmafnkeshĂ«|gonafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafmafnkeshĂ«m|gonafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafmafnkeya|gonafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafmafterom|nafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafmaftemu|nafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafmafteya|nafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafmafterom|gokinafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafmaftemu|gokinafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafmafteya|gokinafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
